---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: feature
assignees: ''
---

## The Problem

What problem does this solve? Who is affected? 
(e.g., "As a developer using Claude Code, I find it hard to...")

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as you can — the clearer the ask, the faster we can evaluate it.

## Why It Matters

How does this improve TokenPak? What use case does it unlock?

## Alternatives Considered

Any workarounds or alternative approaches you've tried.

## Additional Context

Links, screenshots, code examples, or related issues.

---
**Note:** Feature requests with clear use cases and upvotes get prioritized. Give this a 👍 if you want it too!
